name: auralink-ai
description: Run backend, publishing, and frontend for the master flow

scripts.start: npm run inject && npx concurrently -n be,pub,fe -c blue,green,magenta "cd backend && uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000" "cd publishing && node src/index.js" "cd frontend && next dev --hostname 0.0.0.0"
